misc: Doubles as a professional model as his side hustle
Few players dare to give him lip due to his intimidating presence and wrestling skills
biography: Olli, a formidable presence on the greens, brings a unique blend of athleticism and intensity to the Hector Trophée. Representing Helsingin Golfklubi, Olli's imposing stature and rumored wrestling prowess ensure that few dare to challenge him directly.

Beyond golf, Olli is known to dabble as a professional model, showcasing a different facet of his multifaceted personality. This will be Olli's ninth appearance at the Hector Trophée. While the coveted Hector Trophée and the Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Olli's determination remains unwavering, and his competitive spirit makes him a player to watch in every match.
